steps.title: Track cause and effect
steps.content: The second sentence explains the mechanism: spatulae temporarily bond with atoms. The final sentence gives the consequence: spiders can cling to and climb almost any surface.

steps.title: Choose a result transition
steps.content: Choice A introduces an example, Choice B introduces contrast, and Choice C introduces similarity. The remaining transition signals that spiders' climbing ability results from the bonding mechanism. The answer is D.
